title: koeleria pensylvanica
intro: Koeleria pensylvanica, also known as Pennsylvania Koeleria, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Koeleria pensylvanica include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Koeleria pensylvanica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
